codetrace.sidebar.title: CodeTrace
codetrace.config.idleSleep: Enable idle sleep to reduce resource usage
codetrace.config.idleSleepTimeout: Idle timeout in seconds before entering sleep mode
codetrace.config.blameFontSize: Font size for inline blame text (CSS value)
codetrace.config.blameColor: Color for inline blame text ('auto' follows theme)
codetrace.config.ignorePatterns: Glob patterns for files/folders to ignore
codetrace.config.fileSizeLimit: Maximum file lines for inline blame (0 = unlimited)
